things.name: Bara Imambara
things.description: 1784 Nawabi complex with the remarkable Bhulbhuliya labyrinth maze of passages

things.name: Chota Imambara (Husainabad)
things.description: Nawab Muhammad Ali Shah's 1838 imambara with chandeliers and gilded interior

things.name: Rumi Darwaza
things.description: Imposing 18m gateway built in 1784 modelled after a gate in Constantinople

things.name: British Residency
things.description: Ruins of the British Residency besieged for 87 days during the 1857 Uprising

things.name: Chattar Manzil (Umbrella Palace)
things.description: Nawabi palace on the Gomti riverbank now housing research institutes

things.name: Chowk Heritage Walk
things.description: Old city market streets with Lucknawi chikankari embroidery workshops

things.name: Lucknow Zoo & Safari
things.description: One of India's finest zoos featuring tigers, white tigers and gharial crocodiles

things.name: Nawab Wajid Ali Shah Planetarium
things.description: Cultural centre celebrating the last Nawab of Awadh's arts and culture

things.name: Chikankari Embroidery Shopping
things.description: Lucknow's delicate white-on-white needlework embroidery - India's most refined craft

things.name: Tunday Kebabi Restaurant (1905)
things.description: The world's finest kebabs - galouti kebab so soft it melts on your tongue
